title: Crypto Payment Gateways for Digital Products: What It Actually Is and How It Works — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Selling a digital product should be simple. You create something valuable — an ebook, a course, a Notion template, a font, a preset pack, a beat — and someone pays you for access to it. The file transfers. The transaction completes. But for millions of creators, the payment layer is where everything breaks down. PayPal is unavailable. Stripe requires a local bank account that links to an unsupported country. Gumroad holds payouts. The workarounds stop working. What actually works is a crypto-native stack: a static store on GitHub Pages, payment processing through NOWPayments, and automated delivery that sends the download link the moment a transaction confirms on-chain. No middleman. No platform risk. No geography filter.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

The Core Shop Engine is a backend solution designed to automate digital product sales without relying on traditional payment gateways. It works as a standalone platform, eliminating the need for a payment processor account. This means you can sell your digital products anywhere in the world, without worrying about country-specific restrictions or KYC requirements. With the Core Shop Engine, you gain control over your sales, your products, and your customers.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The Core Shop Engine uses a bot engine to automate delivery and payment verification. When a customer makes a purchase, the bot engine takes care of sending the digital product, generating PDF receipts, and verifying payment. This seamless process ensures a smooth customer experience and frees you up to focus on creating more value for your audience. The technology is designed to work with a wide range of digital products, from ebooks and courses to templates and fonts.
Who This Is Built For and Why

The Core Shop Engine is built for digital creators who are tired of being held back by platform restrictions, banking limitations, or KYC requirements. Whether you're an author, a course creator, or a designer, this solution empowers you to sell your digital products directly to your customers, without the need for intermediaries. By using the Core Shop Engine, you can unlock new revenue streams, expand your reach, and build a loyal customer base.
The Core Shop Engine is a game-changer for digital creators stuck in countries with PayPal restrictions.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Core Shop Engine consists of three key components: the backend, the frontend, and the payment gateway. The backend is where the magic happens, automating delivery and payment verification. The frontend is where customers interact with your shop, making purchases and accessing their digital products. The payment gateway is where transactions are processed, using a wide range of cryptocurrencies to facilitate global sales. When these components work together seamlessly, you get a streamlined sales process that's both secure and efficient.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you know how the Core Shop Engine works, it's time to take action. Start by setting up your shop using the Core Shop Engine, integrating it with your existing digital products. Configure your payment settings and connect your cryptocurrency wallet. Once you're up and running, focus on marketing your products and building a loyal customer base. With the Core Shop Engine, you can sell your digital products anywhere in the world, without the need for intermediaries or country-specific restrictions.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
By using the Core Shop Engine, you can sell your digital products anywhere in the world, without worrying about country-specific restrictions or KYC requirements.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for a way to sell digital downloads without fees, or if you want to sell templates and fonts without using Gumroad or Payhip, the Core Shop Engine is the solution you need. This powerful backend solution empowers you to sell your digital products directly to your customers, without the need for intermediaries. Visit https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html to learn more and get started with your own digital product shop.
Your Action Checklist

To start selling digital products with the Core Shop Engine, follow these steps: Set up your shop using the Core Shop Engine and integrate it with your existing digital products. Configure your payment settings and connect your cryptocurrency wallet. Add your products to your shop and ensure they're easily accessible to customers. Test your shop to ensure seamless payment verification and automated delivery. Promote your shop and products to attract customers and drive sales.
The Core Shop Engine is a powerful backend solution that automates digital product sales, freeing you up to focus on creating more value for your audience.
Core Shop Engine — $49.99. Full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account required. Works everywhere.
